title: Delhi HC issues notice to Arvind Kejriwal on plea seeking contempt action for publishing videos of Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma's court
raw_text: The Delhi High Court on Thursday ordered social media intermediaries and search engines including Facebook, Google and X to take down/ remove all videos recordings of court proceedings before Justice Swarana Kanta sharma in the excise policy case in which Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) chief Arvind Kejriwal had appeared and argued in person.
